titleZh: 外商投资合伙企业登记管理规定（2019年修订）
titleEn: Provisions on the Registration of Foreign-Invested Partnership Enterprises (2019 Revision)
shortTitle: 外商投资合伙企业登记管理规定
aliases: 外商投资合伙企业登记规定
issuingBodyZh: 国家市场监督管理总局
summaryZh: 2019年修订的《外商投资合伙企业登记管理规定》承接外商投资法过渡期登记实践；其后因上位法体系重整，在市场监管总局2021年废止规章清理中失去继续单列的必要性。
summaryEn: The 2019 revised registration provisions for foreign-invested partnerships reflected the transition to the Foreign Investment Law, but later became a historical reference after SAMR's 2021 repeal clean-up.

sources.label: Official release
sources.noteZh: 市场监管总局对2021年废止与修改规章清理的官方解读，说明《外商投资合伙企业登记管理规定》因上位法调整而被纳入废止范围。
sources.noteEn: SAMR's official explanation of the 2021 repeal-and-amendment package confirms that the standalone foreign-invested partnership registration provisions were repealed after changes in higher-level law.
